validations.name: MFA Enabled for Global Admins
validations.description: All Global Administrators must have MFA enabled to prevent account takeover
validations.remediation: Enable per-user MFA or require MFA via Conditional Access policy

validations.name: MFA Coverage for All Users
validations.description: Measure percentage of users with MFA enabled
validations.remediation: Enable Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users. Phase enforcement over 4 weeks.

validations.name: Legacy Authentication Blocked
validations.description: Block Basic Auth and legacy protocols (IMAP, POP, SMTP) via Conditional Access
validations.remediation: Create CA policy blocking client types: ExchangeActiveSync, Others (legacy)

validations.name: Passwordless Authentication Adoption
validations.description: Track adoption of FIDO2, Windows Hello, and Microsoft Authenticator
validations.remediation: Deploy Authenticator app + FIDO2 keys. Target high-privilege users first.

validations.name: Conditional Access Policies Enabled
validations.description: Verify at least 3 critical CA policies are enabled
validations.remediation: Enable policies for: MFA, Compliant Devices, Risky Sign-ins, Privileged Roles

validations.name: Require MFA for All Users via CA
validations.description: Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users
validations.remediation: Create CA policy: All users, All apps, Require MFA grant

validations.name: Require Compliant Devices via CA
validations.description: CA policy requires device compliance for sensitive apps
validations.remediation: Create CA policy for Office 365, Sharepoint, Teams requiring compliant device

validations.name: Risk-Based Access via Identity Protection
validations.description: User Risk policy enabled to block risky users
validations.remediation: Enable User Risk policy at Medium/High with block action

validations.name: Sign-in Risk Detection Enabled
validations.description: Sign-in Risk policy blocks risky sign-ins
validations.remediation: Enable Sign-in Risk policy blocking high-risk sign-ins or requiring MFA

validations.name: PIM (Privileged Identity Management) Enabled
validations.description: PIM must be enabled for Just-In-Time privileged access
validations.remediation: Enable PIM in Entra ID. Convert permanent assignments to PIM (activation required).

validations.name: Global Admin Count Minimized
validations.description: Global Admin role should have ≤2 permanent members
validations.evidence: Count of permanent Global Admin assignments
validations.remediation: Reduce to max 2 permanent Global Admins. Use PIM for temporary elevation.

validations.name: Break-Glass Accounts Configured
validations.description: Emergency access accounts for break-glass scenarios
validations.graphApi: GET /v1.0/directoryObjects?$filter=accountEnabled eq true and userType eq 'Guest'
validations.evidence: Break-glass account count and MFA status
validations.remediation: Create 2 dedicated Global Admin accounts. Store credentials offline securely.

validations.name: Intune MDM Enrollment Required
validations.description: Mobile Device Management must be enforced via Conditional Access
validations.remediation: Enable CA policy requiring device enrollment for mobile access

validations.name: Device Compliance Policy Enforced
validations.description: Intune compliance policies define minimum security requirements
validations.evidence: Count and coverage of compliance policies
validations.remediation: Create compliance policies for Windows, iOS, Android devices

validations.name: BitLocker Enabled on Windows Devices
validations.description: BitLocker encryption required on all Windows devices
validations.remediation: Deploy BitLocker via Intune configuration profile. Monitor via compliance

validations.name: Windows Defender Enabled
validations.description: Windows Defender antivirus must be enabled on all devices
validations.remediation: Deploy Defender policy via Intune. Enforce via compliance

validations.name: Defender for Endpoint Onboarded
validations.description: EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) via Defender for Endpoint
validations.remediation: Onboard devices via Intune, Group Policy, or manual registration

validations.name: High-Privilege Applications Identified
validations.description: Track applications with admin consent to sensitive Graph permissions
validations.expectedValue: All high-privilege apps identified and reviewed
validations.evidence: Count of high-privilege apps and owners
validations.remediation: Review permissions. Revoke unused. Implement approval workflow.

validations.name: Unused Enterprise Applications Removed
validations.description: Remove/disable applications with no active users
validations.remediation: Review application usage logs. Disable/remove unused apps.

validations.name: Stale Service Principals Removed
validations.description: Service principals without recent sign-in activity
validations.evidence: Count of inactive principals >1 year old
validations.remediation: Review last sign-in logs. Remove if unused for >180 days.

validations.name: OAuth Admin Consent Workflow Enabled
validations.description: Require admin approval before apps can access sensitive permissions
validations.remediation: Enable admin consent requirement in Azure AD > App registrations settings

validations.name: Risky Graph Permissions Detected
validations.description: Applications with dangerous permissions (Mail.All, User.Read.All, etc)
validations.evidence: Count of apps with risky permissions
validations.remediation: Review and reduce scope. Use delegated permissions instead of app-only.

validations.name: Expiring Client Secrets
validations.description: Track application secrets expiring within 30 days
validations.evidence: Count of expiring secrets by date
validations.remediation: Rotate secrets. Store new ones in Azure Key Vault.

validations.name: DLP Policies Configured
validations.description: Data Loss Prevention policies protect sensitive data
validations.evidence: Count and coverage of DLP policies
validations.remediation: Create DLP policies for: Credit cards, SSN, Health data, Trade secrets

validations.name: Sensitivity Labels Configured
validations.description: Sensitivity labels classify and protect documents
validations.remediation: Create labels: Public, Internal, Confidential, Secret + encryption rules

validations.name: Auto-Labeling Rules Enabled
validations.description: Auto-apply labels based on content patterns
validations.remediation: Create rules for: SSN, Credit Card, Health data patterns

validations.name: SharePoint Sharing Policy Restricted
validations.description: Restrict external sharing to approved domains
validations.expectedValue: Sharing limited to authenticated guests only
validations.remediation: Set to 'New and existing guests' or 'Existing guests only'

validations.name: OneDrive Sharing Policy Restricted
validations.description: Personal OneDrive sharing restricted to policy
validations.remediation: Set to 'New and existing guests' with link expiration

validations.name: Anti-Phishing Policy Enabled
validations.description: Advanced anti-phishing protection configured
validations.remediation: Enable anti-phishing with user/domain impersonation detection

validations.name: Safe Links Enabled
validations.description: Safe Links scans URLs in real-time
validations.remediation: Enable Safe Links for all users. Set click tracking to On.

validations.name: Safe Attachments Enabled
validations.description: Safe Attachments scans files in sandboxed environment
validations.evidence: Policy status and dynamic delivery settings
validations.remediation: Enable Safe Attachments. Set action to 'Block'.

validations.name: Anti-Spam Policy Enabled
validations.description: Anti-spam filters reduce junk mail
validations.evidence: Policy status and bulk mail threshold
validations.remediation: Configure standard anti-spam with bulk mail filtering

validations.name: DKIM Configured
validations.description: DKIM signing prevents email spoofing
validations.remediation: Enable DKIM for all accepted domains in Exchange

validations.name: SPF Configured
validations.description: SPF records prevent unauthorized senders
validations.remediation: Publish SPF record: v=spf1 include:spf.protection.outlook.com ~all

validations.name: DMARC Configured
validations.description: DMARC policy enforcement blocks phishing
validations.remediation: Publish DMARC: _dmarc.domain.com TXT 'v=DMARC1; p=reject; rua=...'

validations.name: External Forwarding Blocked
validations.description: Block mail forwarding rules to external recipients
validations.remediation: Create transport rule blocking external forwarding

validations.name: Copilot User MFA Enforcement
validations.description: All Copilot users must have MFA enabled
validations.remediation: Require MFA via CA policy for users with Copilot license

validations.name: Overshared SharePoint Sites Detected
validations.description: Sites shared 'Everyone' or anonymous are visible to Copilot
validations.remediation: Audit and restrict sharing. Apply sensitivity labels.

validations.name: Overshared OneDrive Content Detected
validations.description: OneDrive folders shared externally expose data to Copilot
validations.expectedValue: No external sharing via anonymous links
validations.remediation: Disable anonymous sharing in OneDrive. Use specific user access.

validations.name: AI Agent Graph Permissions Minimal
validations.description: AI agents have least-privilege Graph permissions only
validations.graphApi: GET /v1.0/servicePrincipals?$filter=displayName eq 'AI Agent' or displayName eq 'Copilot*'
validations.remediation: Review and remove unnecessary permissions. Use delegated when possible.

validations.name: AI Agent Secrets Rotation
validations.description: Long-lived secrets rotated regularly (<90 days)
validations.remediation: Rotate secrets monthly. Use Key Vault for storage.

validations.name: Unified Audit Logging Enabled
validations.description: Audit log required for compliance and forensics
validations.remediation: Enable Audit Log Search in Security & Compliance center

validations.name: Mailbox Auditing Enabled
validations.description: Track mailbox access and modifications
validations.remediation: Enable mailbox auditing for all users via transport rules

validations.name: Alert Policies Configured
validations.description: Alert policies notify on suspicious activities
validations.powershell: Get-ProtectionAlert | Select AlertType, Enabled | Sort Enabled -Descending
validations.evidence: Count and types of alert policies
validations.remediation: Enable alerts for: MFA disabled, User added to admin roles, Forwarding rules

validations.name: Microsoft Defender Enabled
validations.description: Threat protection dashboard active
validations.remediation: Ensure Defender for Endpoint licenses and onboarding

validations.name: Zero-Hour Auto Purge (ZAP) Enabled
validations.description: Automatically remove malicious emails after delivery
validations.expectedValue: ZAP enabled for phishing and malware
validations.remediation: Enable ZAP in anti-phishing and anti-malware policies
